message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml Compass Sequence Diagram

actor User
participant "HubSpot" as HubSpot
participant "TypeForm" as TypeForm
participant "TypeForm API" as TypeFormAPI
participant "Node App" as NodeApp
rectangle AWS {
    participant "S3 Bucket" as S3Bucket
    participant "SES" as SES
}

User -> HubSpot: Loads Compass
activate HubSpot
HubSpot -> HubSpot: Generate UUID to identify user
deactivate HubSpot
HubSpot -> TypeForm: Load embedded TypeForm survrey
User -> HubSpot: Completes survey
HubSpot -> HubSpot: Redirects to HubSpot Landing Page Submission Form\nhttps://info.codurance.com/en/compass-details-submission
User -> HubSpot: Completes submission form
activate HubSpot
HubSpot -> HubSpot: Save submission info & contact in Hubspot
deactivate HubSpot
HubSpot -> NodeApp: Redirects to /report/submit/:uuid (to generate report)
activate NodeApp
NodeApp -> NodeApp: Start report generation
deactivate NodeApp
NodeApp -> HubSpot: Redirects to HubSpot Thanks Landing Page\n"https://info.codurance.com/en/compass-successful-submission"
NodeApp -> TypeFormAPI: Gets survrey questions & answers
activate TypeFormAPI
TypeFormAPI --> NodeApp
deactivate TypeFormAPI
note left of HubSpot: generate report and send email
NodeApp -> HubSpot: Get user details
activate HubSpot
deactivate HubSpot
NodeApp -> NodeApp: Build report and render with jsreport
activate NodeApp
deactivate NodeApp
NodeApp -> S3Bucket: Upload report to AWS S3 bucket
activate S3Bucket
S3Bucket --> NodeApp: Query report link
deactivate S3Bucket
NodeApp -> NodeApp: Compose email data with report pdf link
activate NodeApp
deactivate NodeApp
NodeApp -> SES: Queue email for sending
activate SES
deactivate SES
NodeApp -> User: Send email to user
deactivate NodeApp

@enduml
```
